title: DATABASE
body: Every Ignition system needs at least one database for tag history, alarm journals, audit logs, and named queries.
code:
Create Connection:
  Name:   main_db
  Type:   MySQL | PostgreSQL | MSSQL | MariaDB
  URL:    jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/ignition
  User:   ignition_user
  Pass:   [password]
  Extra:  useSSL=false (dev only)
Test Connection → "Valid"

Learning: SQLite works, zero setup.
mistakes: Skipping the database (no historian = no trends)
Using root DB credentials in Ignition
Forgetting to create the database first
